observations.description: A teacher is seen walking towards the children, who are seated at a table. The teacher then kneels down to interact with a child.
The teacher is still kneeling and interacting with the child. Another child in a red dress approaches the table.
The teacher stands up and walks away from the table. Another teacher approaches the children at the table. A child in a black dress walks towards the shelves with toys.
The child in the black dress is playing with toys on the shelf. The teacher kneels down to interact with another child. Another teacher walks towards the children.
The child in the black dress walks towards the center of the room. The teacher is still kneeling and interacting with the child. Another child in a white dress walks towards the center of the room.
The child in the black dress is playing with toys on the floor. The teacher is still kneeling and interacting with the child. Another child in a white dress walks towards the center of the room.
The teacher stands up and walks away from the children. Another teacher approaches the children at the table. The child in the black dress is still playing with toys on the floor.
The teacher is interacting with the children at the table. The child in the black dress is still playing with toys on the floor. Another child in a pink dress walks towards the center of the room.
